title.en: In this way, he could continue to be in charge ...

content.en:
Ye Tian had previously broken through to the Triple Supreme Realm as a copy body, although he forcibly broke through regardless of the foundation, but at least he had experience.

Therefore, if Ye Tian wanted to break through quickly, he would naturally be able to quickly break through to the realm of the Triple Supreme.

However, he couldn't break through like this, he had to break through in a perfect foundation state, and he wouldn't use a treasure like the Primordial Source Liquid, otherwise it would be difficult to break the boundaries of the Nine Heavens in the future.

Even if the number of refining of the Primordial Source Liquid is too high, I am afraid that it will be very difficult to even become a Ninefold Supreme.

Therefore, Ye Tian would rather cultivate to a slower speed of strength improvement than rush to a higher realm.

After the Eternals fused, Ye Tian copied a first-class invincible realm of Xu Chen, and then let Xu Chen enter the Star Ancient Domain with the ancient star stone, start retreat in a remote place, and soon hit the supreme realm.

Then, with some resources, he was ready to rush to the Dual Supreme Realm, or even the Triple Supreme Realm, as quickly as possible.

In this way, he could continue to be in charge of the Star Ancient Domain.

After all, he didn't want to give up the Star Ancient Domain now, after all, it could still provide him with a lot of resources here, and it would be a pity if he gave up like this.

Hall of Void Source.

Ye Tian called Ye Jinpeng over.

"Ancestor!"

Ye Jinpeng said respectfully.

At this time, Ye Tian gave Ye Jinpeng some tokens of the Children of the Void, and commanded: "I can't enter the Dark Forbidden Domain with my true body now, you are still in the realm of a third-class invincible, and you can also enter the Dark Forbidden Domain, you give these tokens of the Children of the Void to your Star Ancestor and them, let them refine the tokens, and then you can enter the Void Source Hall as the Children of the Void to participate in the cultivation of the Void Source Tablet." As for the remaining Void Child Tokens, they will be given to the demonic geniuses of the human race in the future. "

"Yes!"

Ye Jinpeng responded.

Subsequently, Ye Jinpeng returned to the Dark Forbidden Realm and handed these tokens to Xiao Yue, Ye Xingchen, Ye Yu and other ancestors.

Soon, Xiao Yue and the others also came to the Void Source Palace, anyway, in the future, the Void Source Hall will not allow other Void Children to enter here, so it is okay to treat the Void Source Hall as a treasure land of the human race.

"Husband!"

Xiao Yue was quite excited when she saw Ye Tian.

And Ye Tian's children were also very happy to see their father, and soon asked Ye Tian about his recent situation, and were naturally extremely happy to learn that Ye Tian had broken through to the supreme realm.

In the following days, Ye Tian's family members practiced here, and Ye Jinpeng also selected a few demonic geniuses from the human race to enter the Void Source Palace, with the battle tempering of the Void Tower, and the enlightenment of the Void Source Monument, their progress will be very fast.

Of course, it is not very clear whether they can break through to the invincible above the second rank, let alone break through to the supreme realm.

But no matter what, generations of Terran geniuses entering the Void Source Hall will always have one who can become the supreme, after all, the bloodline foundation of the Terran is getting stronger and stronger, and it is not the ordinary race before.

Instead of expecting the human race to give birth to the third Supreme One, Ye Tian felt that he still wanted to help his relatives break through to the Supreme One realm at all costs, which was more reliable.

Of course.

If you want to help your relatives break through to the supreme realm, I am afraid that it will take a long time, not to calculate time in the Great Tribulation Era, but to calculate time in the Tribulation Yuan.

In order to help his relatives have a greater hope of being promoted to the Supreme One, Ye Tian also specially devoted himself to the Eternal Ancestor Fu that fit their cultivation path, and then gave them the Eternal Ancestor Gift, but in this case, it would be difficult for him to explain.

However, he believes that his relatives will not ask too much.

So, it took him some years to merge into an eternal ancestral endowment, and gave it to Ye Xingchen, Ye Xingyue, Ye Yu and Xiao Yue, as for the others, they didn't have such treatment, even Ye Jinpeng Ye didn't have such treatment.

Ye Tian also told his wife and children not to divulge this secret, and at the same time did not say much.

I have to say that after obtaining the Eternal Ancestral Endowment, their progress speed is very fast, and with the assistance of the Void Source Monument, the progress speed of their Eternal Rules is too fast, and it is very easy to become a third-rank invincible person at such a speed.

However, it is still difficult to be promoted to a second-class invincible, and you must have enough resources, potential, and time.

Before you know it, thousands of great tribulations have passed.

At this time, the human race gave birth to many invincible people, and there were countless ancestors.

And the territory of the human race is spread over many foreign worlds, and it can be said to be a top force in foreign worlds.

And Ye Jinpeng did not disappoint Ye Tian, he finally became a real son of the void, broke through the first layer of the void tower with his own skills, and created the void source body, although it is a void source body of price comparison garbage, and the flaws are relatively large, but it is enough to rank among the source bodies of gods.

Ye Jinpeng broke through the first layer of the Void Tower, and condensed a very ordinary Void Source Body, and did not continue to accumulate the foundation, he was already very satisfied, in terms of potential, he was already stronger than the Heavenly Wind Source God, second only to the Autumn Leaf Source Ancestor.

Therefore, he did not continue to stay in the realm of third-class invincibles, and began to attack second-class invincibles.

Not long after, he successfully stepped into the realm of a second-class invincible.

After breaking through to the realm of a second-class invincible, Ye Jinpeng would not be able to return to the Dark Forbidden Realm, so he entered the Tianlin Realm and spent most of his time in the Tianfeng Sea.

And Ye Tian's family members have also stepped into the realm of third-class invincibles early, if they break through to the realm of second-class invincibles in the future, and before the dark forbidden realm is promoted to eternal heaven and earth, I am afraid that they can only stay in the Tianlin realm.

this day.

Ye Tian's cultivation had finally reached the limit of the Tier One Being, and he was only one step away from the Tier Two Beings, but if he didn't refine the Primordial Source Liquid, it would not be so easy to break through to the realm of the Tier Two Beings.

Ye Tian didn't want to continue the retreat, and it just so happened that not long after, the Heavenly Wind Source God came to him.

The Heavenly Wind Source God knew that Ye Tian had broken through to the Supreme Realm, after all, it was impossible for Ye Tian not to return to the Heavenly Wind Sea all the time, and it was normal for him to cultivate to break through.

But in the entire Heavenly Wind Sea, except for the Heavenly Wind Source God, the others didn't know that Ye Tian had broken through to the Supreme Realm.

It's a secret!

"Tianfeng, what are you looking for me?"

Ye Tian asked.

Tianfeng Yuan Shen said solemnly: "The Lord of the Netherworld Hall has the hope of breaking through to the realm of the Dual Supreme, once he breaks through, his strength will far surpass me, and then the Tianfeng Sea is afraid that he will not be able to compete with the Netherworld Palace, so I want to stop him, I need your help." "

"How?"

Ye Tiandao.

The Heavenly Wind Source God said the plan.

His plan was simple, because the Netherworld Temple wanted an opportunity in a treasure land to impact the realm of the Double Supreme One.

Therefore, they besieged the Netherworld Hall Lord in that treasure land, and destroyed the Netherworld Hall Lord's promotion, and it was best to kill him.

"Okay, I got it!"

Ye Tian agreed, after all, when he was still weak, Tianfeng Hai blessed him, otherwise he might not be able to grow to this point, so it was a matter of course to help Tianfeng Source God.
